overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city plaza with towering skyscrapers, digital billboards, and palm trees. The character moves through an open commercial area with various NPCs and shops before entering a narrower street canyon with massive architectural structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with massive digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza looking up at towering advertisements and palm trees

entered.detail: large yellow digital billboard displaying 'Set Sail for Flavor' with a figure in swimwear
tall palm trees scattered throughout the plaza area
small storefront with green roof and 'PAWNSHOP' signage
reflective tiled ground surface of the pedestrian plaza
steam or smoke rising from vents near the building base

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic urban plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards. The camera moves forward across reflective tiled ground, passing palm trees and approaching a pawn shop. The lighting is bright midday sun mixed with neon artificial lights from the advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with pawn shop and neon storefronts

events.description: character's hand becomes visible in lower frame indicating first-person perspective
pedestrian in blue shirt crosses close to camera view

agents.ego_description: moving through the plaza passing by the pawn shop and other pedestrians, hand visible in lower frame

notable_agents.action: man in blue shirt and shorts walking across the plaza

entered.detail: large horizontal screen displaying three stylized faces with purple and teal hair
storefront with bright pink neon lighting and signage

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the plaza, revealing a large digital screen showing three faces on the left wall. A pedestrian in a blue shirt crosses the path closely. The pawn shop moves to the left side of the frame as the character approaches a ramp leading to a narrower street.

events.description: moving from open plaza into narrower street canyon with ascending ramp
camera tilts upward to look at towering skyscrapers and mega structures

agents.ego_description: walking up a ramp between tall buildings while looking up at the massive architecture above

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: massive building structure with large archway spanning between towers
tall skyscraper with illuminated 'D' logo on the facade
elevated roadway structure running between buildings
tall concrete wall with graffiti on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the open plaza into a narrower street canyon with an ascending ramp. The camera looks up in awe at a massive arch structure connecting skyscrapers. Palm trees now line the right side of the concrete path as the character follows a pedestrian with green hair upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy street canyon with food stalls and heavy foot traffic

events.description: approaching a bus stop and food stall area with increased pedestrian activity

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street canyon past palm trees and approaching a busy stall area with multiple NPCs

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near a yellow food stall with anime character art

entered.detail: bright yellow food stall decorated with anime character artwork
red and green bus shelter with seating and signage
small vendor cart with umbrella near the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the street canyon, now approaching a busier area with a yellow food stall and bus shelter. The mega arch structure remains visible in the distance while pedestrians gather near the stalls. The environment maintains the enclosed canyon feel with towering buildings on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit urban plaza into the enclosed depths of a towering street canyon. It begins by gliding across reflective tiled ground beneath massive digital billboards and palm trees, passing a pawn shop under a mix of midday sun and artificial light. As the camera moves forward, it passes a large screen displaying three faces and a pedestrian in a blue shirt before approaching a ramp that narrows the field of view. The scene then shifts from the open plaza to an ascending concrete path, where the camera looks up at a massive arch connecting skyscrapers while following a green-haired pedestrian. Finally, the movement continues deeper into the canyon environment, passing a yellow food stall and a bus shelter as the towering buildings close in around the bustling crowd.
